title: Project Okapi: Data logger with integrated solar charging and modular telemetry

creators.name: Schulz, Bobby
creators.affiliation: Northern Widget LLC; University of Minnesota

creators.name: Wickert, Andrew D.
creators.affiliation: Northern Widget LLC; University of Minnesota

description: The Okapi data logger is a robust, flexible, and power-efficient open-source platform for recording and transmitting data from remote locations. It features dual power supplies (solar-charged lithium-ion primary and alkaline AA backup), an ATMega1284p microcontroller, DS3231M real-time clock, micro-SD local storage, and support for Feather-form-factor telemetry boards. Sensors connect via dual independent I2C/SPI buses with selectable 3.3V or 5V rails.
